creator: adrian@freebsd.org
text:
An update to the latest binary pkgng set has broken minecraft-client:

adrian@sabrina:~ % minecraft-client 
When starting a version for the first time, select the version you want in your
profile, start Minecraft, close Minecraft and launcher, run minecraft-client
again, then select version "x-freebsd" in your profile.

If you run versions older than 1.6.1 in the Launcher, add
-Djava.net.preferIPv4Stack=true to JVM Arguments in the profile.

Error: Could not find or load main class net.minecraft.client.Main
adrian@sabrina:~ % 
adrian@sabrina:~ % pkg info | grep minecraft
minecraft-client-1.7.5         Client for the block building game
adrian@sabrina:~ % pkg info | grep jdk
openjdk-7.51.13_2,1            Java Development Kit 7
openjdk6-b30_3,1               Oracle's Java 6 virtual machine release under the GPL v2
rxtx-openjdk6-2.2p2            Native interface to serial ports in Java
